message:
Modernize from_mysql operator

Improve code clarity and maintainability by adopting modern C++20
standard library utilities. Replace manual byte manipulation with
std::memcpy and as_bytes(), exception-prone numeric parsing with
std::from_chars(), and reduce error handling boilerplate with the TRY()
macro. Deduplicate auth hash logic into a parameterized template,
simplify enum conversions with std::to_underlying(), and extract common
error emission into a helper function.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,3 +1,5 @@
+# We're using a suite not because the tests require sequential processing, but
+# to minimize the container startup overhead that we want to pay only once.
 suite: from-mysql
 fixtures: [mysql]
 timeout: 180
